_doc: LPDDR4x spec (Phase 1.2 analytic). This is the production Metis Card's on-card memory and the MEASURED anchor: eff_BW 24.2 GB/s (voyager-sdk.md:278, decode time prop weight bytes, r2=0.997). 64-bit bus, JEDEC 4266 MT/s -> 34.1 peak; board 4224 -> 33.8. Peaks tagged ASSUMPTION; eff 0.71 = 24.2/34.1 MEASURED. NOTE: this on-card LPDDR4x (24.2) is a DIFFERENT memory from the RK3588 host LPDDR4 in cpu_rk3588 -- do not mix.

notes.anchor: eff_BW 24.2 = production Metis Card on-card LPDDR4x decode measurement (the L4 BW anchor).
notes.distinct: on-card LPDDR4x (24.2) != RK3588 host LPDDR4 (cpu_rk3588) != Metis SRAM tier.

provenance.eff_BW_GBs: production Metis Card on-card decode 24.2 GB/s (voyager-sdk.md:278, r2=0.997) [measured]
